description.task: Implement a MatrixOperations class that performs basic 2D array operations: create an n×n identity matrix, transpose a matrix in-place, and multiply two n×n matrices.
instructions: identity(n): create int[n][n], set matrix[i][i]=1 for i in 0..n-1, return it
transpose(matrix): for each i and j, set result[i][j] = matrix[j][i]
multiply(a, b): triple nested loop — for i, for j, for k: result[i][j] += a[i][k] * b[k][j]
All three methods must be implemented
M * Identity must equal M; verify with a={{1,2},{3,4}}
description.hint: identity: int[][] id=new int[n][n]; for(int i=0;i<n;i++) id[i][i]=1; return id. multiply: 3 nested for loops adding a[i][k]*b[k][j] to result[i][j].

description.task: Implement a SpiralTraversal class that traverses an m×n matrix in spiral order (top row → right column → bottom row → left column, repeat layers inward) and returns the elements in the order visited.
instructions: Traverse the top row (left to right), then right column (top+1 to bottom), then bottom row (right-1 to left, only if top!=bottom), then left column (bottom-1 to top+1, only if left!=right)
After each layer, increment top and left, decrement bottom and right
Continue while top <= bottom and left <= right
description.hint: Add top-row loop, right-column loop, conditional bottom-row (reversed) loop, conditional left-column (reversed) loop, then top++; bottom--; left++; right--;

description.task: Implement a DiagonalSum class with methods to compute the primary diagonal sum (top-left to bottom-right), secondary diagonal sum (top-right to bottom-left), and the difference between them for a square n×n matrix.
instructions: primaryDiagonalSum: loop i from 0 to n-1, sum matrix[i][i]
secondaryDiagonalSum: loop i from 0 to n-1, sum matrix[i][n-1-i]
For the given matrix: primary = 1+5+9=15, secondary = 3+5+9=17, difference = 2
All three methods must be implemented
description.hint: int n = matrix.length; int sum=0; for(int i=0;i<n;i++) sum+=matrix[i][i]; return sum; — repeated similarly for secondary.
description.expectedOutput:
Primary diagonal sum: 15
Secondary diagonal sum: 17
Diagonal difference: 2
